user_prompt: Make an L-bracket 100 mm base leg, 80 mm vertical leg, 40 mm wide, and 6 mm thick, with two holes on the base and two holes on the vertical face.
objective: Generate an editable parametric L-bracket with explicit leg and hole intent.
requirements: L-bracket has two perpendicular rectangular legs joined at 90 degrees.
Base and vertical leg dimensions are named parameters.
Base leg has two symmetric mounting holes.
Vertical leg has two symmetric mounting holes.
assumptions: The L-bracket legs meet at a 90-degree inside corner.
Base and vertical holes are centered across bracket_width_mm.

base_leg.reason: Base leg is required for the L-bracket family.

vertical_leg.reason: Vertical leg is required for the L-bracket family.

base_mounting_holes.reason: Example prompt requests two holes on the base leg.

vertical_mounting_holes.reason: Example prompt requests two holes on the vertical leg.

inside_fillet.reason: Example prompt does not request an inside fillet.

outside_edge_fillets.reason: Example prompt does not request outside edge fillets.

triangular_gusset.reason: Example prompt does not request a gusset.
